# Vendor Evaluation Matrix

## Section 2 --- Compliance Screening (Pass/Fail)

All respondents must pass mandatory compliance requirements before technical evaluation proceeds.

| Compliance Item                 | Vendor A        | Vendor B        | Vendor C        | Vendor D        |
| ------------------------------- | --------------- | --------------- | --------------- | --------------- |
| Proposal received by deadline   | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| All mandatory sections complete | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| Signed cover letter included    | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| Financial statements provided   | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| Insurance certificates current  | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| NDA signed and returned         | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| Conflict of interest disclosed  | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| Minimum [X] years experience    | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       | [ ] P / F       |
| **Compliance Status**           | **PASS / FAIL** | **PASS / FAIL** | **PASS / FAIL** | **PASS / FAIL** |

---

## Section 3 --- Weighted Scoring Matrix

### 3.1 Scoring Scale

| Score | Rating         | Definition                                                           |
| ----- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 9-10  | Exceptional    | Significantly exceeds requirements; demonstrates innovative approach |
| 7-8   | Strong         | Exceeds requirements in meaningful ways                              |
| 5-6   | Acceptable     | Meets all stated requirements                                        |
| 3-4   | Marginal       | Partially meets requirements; notable gaps                           |
| 1-2   | Weak           | Fails to meet most requirements                                      |
| 0     | Non-Responsive | No response or completely inadequate                                 |

### 3.2 Consolidated Scoring

| #   | Criterion                              | Weight   | Vendor A   | Vendor B   | Vendor C   | Vendor D   |
| --- | -------------------------------------- | -------- | ---------- | ---------- | ---------- | ---------- |
| 1   | Technical Approach and Solution Design | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 2   | Organizational Experience              | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 3   | Key Personnel Qualifications           | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 4   | Implementation Plan                    | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 5   | Total Cost of Ownership                | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 6   | References and Past Performance        | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
| 7   | Risk Profile                           | [X]%     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     | [X]/10     |
|     | **Weighted Total**                     | **100%** | **[X.XX]** | **[X.XX]** | **[X.XX]** | **[X.XX]** |
|     | **Rank**                               |          | [X]        | [X]        | [X]        | [X]        |
